docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $575.00 FILED BY PERCY JAMES LEE AS TO DEFENDANT BUREAU OF CCOLLECTION & INVESTIGATIVE SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO JEFFREY YOUNG (BCI) RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PERCY JAMES LEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUREAU OF CCOLLECTION & INVESTIGATIVE SERVICES $575.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $595.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BUREAU OF CCOLLECTION & INVESTIGATIVE SERVICES
